description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage and four jobs: build-1_56, build-beta, build-nightly, and build-stable. Use the rust:1.56-slim Docker image for build-1_56 and rust:latest for the other three jobs. In build-1_56 run the scripts cargo build --verbose, cargo test --verbose, and cargo doc --verbose. In build-beta add a before_script rustup default beta and then run cargo build --verbose, cargo test --verbose, and cargo doc --verbose. In build-nightly add a before_script rustup default nightly and then run cargo build --verbose --locked, cargo test --verbose --locked, and cargo doc --verbose --locked. In build-stable run cargo build --verbose, cargo test --verbose, and cargo doc --verbose, with no before_script. All jobs have no dependencies, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
